suffering_zones: Double Col de la Croix: 1778m opener and finale with 13% ramps after 100km fatigue in Vaud heat.
Hongrin Valley Reversal: Post-low 690m dam, grinding back up through Mosses/Forclaz on tired legs.
Mittelberg Wilds: Exposed 1633m climb linking regions with relentless alpine gradients.

final_verdict.one_liner: Brutal Vaud Alps qualifier with double Croix punishment.

videos.title: Mountain Concepts Designed Truckee Custom Home | Sierra Sotheby's International Realty
videos.description:
11655 Mount Rose View Dr, Truckee, CA | https://sierrasir.qrd.by/11655mountrose

It's not often you see a home with stunning design, architecture, high-end finishes, its own Game House, and immediate access to wide open space and a host of outdoor experiences.

Tucked behind a gate in a mature stand of pines and aspens with impeccably maintained grounds and adjacent to designated national forest service land is one of the finest mountain retreats we have seen. The private and peaceful compound completed in 2019 is the perfect place to escape, unwind, and play. Rebuilt from the foundation up and designed by Mountain Concepts architect, David Spear, exceptional custom details include expansive open living areas with walls of glass that recede, inviting the outdoors in, multiple covered terraces and blended indoor-outdoor spaces. Herringbone Appalachian white oak floors with a fumed finish, a floating staircase, horizontal grain white oak doors, massive steel rafters, and hand painted japanese rice paper are a sampling of the carefully cultivated aesthetics that compliment the home. For comfort and ease you will find bespoke tile and light fixtures throughout, smart home technology, radiant heat, Lutron lighting, security gate, and a surveillance system. The 7,000+ square foot home has two distinct bedroom wings with a total of six bedrooms, four and a half baths, an office, two media rooms, and many tranquil outdoor living areas.

Designed and landscaped with outdoor recreation and fun in mind, the beautiful grounds include a crystal clear custom water feature deep enough to swim in. Play lawn games, roast marshmallows around the fire, curl up with a book on one of the many inviting outdoor spaces, soak in the hot tub, or hit the Game House; the options for fun and relaxation are many.

GAME HOUSE

A big (and beautiful) house of fun with flagstone floors, a soaring fireplace, a large wet-bar with counter seating, a billiards room, a fitness area, a ping pong table and shuffleboard, a media area and a full bath. The Game House might be our favorite feature on the property.

GARAGES APLENTY

There are three separate large heated garages, a custom gear tuning room, and a workshop on the property providing an abundance of storage for recreational vehicles, boats, snowmobiles, ATV's and cars. The first garage is adjacent to the house and is a large three plus car garage with an oversized bay big enough for a boat. The second garage is a detached four car garage, and the third is a four car garage currently used a toy garage.

RECREATION

Prosser Lake and trail system are a short distance away offering year round activities including swimming, paddleboarding, boating, fishing, mountain biking, hiking, snowshoeing, cross country skiing, and snowmobiling. For motorized fun Prosser Pits Recreational Area is also a short distance away. This secluded and gated property has quick and easy access to downtown Truckee, I-80, area ski resorts, and Lake Tahoe.

Presented by: Overall & Hamilton Group
